title: Postface: fragmentation, failing trust and enduring tensions over what counts as climate finance
Insights: The paper discusses the fragmented nature of climate finance accounting, particularly the limitations of the Rio markers system used by developed countries for reporting to the UNFCCC. Key thinkers like Weikmans and Roberts emphasize the need for rigorous accounting modalities to enhance transparency and trust.
